sources.name: EU Treaties (TEU, TFEU, Charter)
sources.completeness_note: Selected key articles from TEU, TFEU, and Charter of Fundamental Rights

sources.name: EU Regulations (GDPR, AI Act, DORA, DMA, DSA, Data Act, CRA, eIDAS 2.0)
sources.authority: European Parliament and Council of the EU
sources.completeness_note: Key articles from 8 regulations. Not full texts — selected provisions for cybersecurity and data protection.

sources.name: EU Directives (NIS2, PSD2, CER, ePrivacy, AI Liability, Product Liability)
sources.authority: European Parliament and Council of the EU
sources.completeness_note: Key articles from 6 directives with NIS2 transposition tracking

sources.name: CJEU Landmark Cases
sources.authority: Court of Justice of the European Union
sources.completeness_note: 13 landmark cases in data protection, digital rights, and competition law. Summaries only — not full judgments.

gaps.description: Regulations and directives include selected key articles, not complete texts
gaps.reason: Full texts are lengthy; database focuses on provisions most relevant to cybersecurity and compliance

gaps.description: Only 13 landmark cases included, not comprehensive CJEU jurisprudence
gaps.reason: CJEU database is large; initial version covers high-impact cases only

gaps.description: Transposition tracking covers 10 member states for NIS2 only
gaps.reason: Transposition data is manually compiled from national sources

gaps.description: Delegated and implementing acts (RTS/ITS) data returns empty for most regulations
gaps.reason: Delegated acts not yet seeded — requires legal_basis cross-referencing in eu_acts table

gaps.description: Case law entries are editorial summaries, not full judgment text
gaps.reason: Full judgments are lengthy and require structured extraction from curia.europa.eu

tools.name: search_eu_law
tools.description: FTS5 search across all EU law articles

tools.name: get_article
tools.description: Get a specific article by act short title and article number

tools.name: get_regulation
tools.description: Get regulation metadata with article count

tools.name: get_directive
tools.description: Get directive metadata with transposition status

tools.name: get_case_law
tools.description: Get a CJEU case by case number or ECLI

tools.name: search_case_law
tools.description: Search CJEU cases by keyword with court and importance filtering

tools.name: get_transposition_status
tools.description: Check directive transposition by member state

tools.name: get_regulatory_technical_standard
tools.description: Get delegated/implementing acts under a parent regulation

tools.name: build_legal_stance
tools.description: Aggregate provisions and case law for a legal question

tools.name: validate_citation
tools.description: Validate an EU law citation against the database

tools.name: list_sources
tools.description: List all sources with provenance and record counts

tools.name: about
tools.description: Server metadata, data coverage, and disclaimer

tools.name: check_data_freshness
tools.description: Check database build date, schema version, and record counts
